description: The nike Main Draw is simple and stylish trainer designed to provide great comfort and casual style. The leather upper provides a comfortable, breathable snug Fit, while the padded insole and rubber outsole gives great eye appeal. The low profile vulcanised sole gives light duty grip - perfect for skate boarding and urban living. Upper Simplified leather panel construction Stitch detailing below central lacing for added durability Padded tongue and collar for snug fit Strong knit laces for snug fit and to lock the foot in place Midsole Non-stitched rubber cupsole for enhanced shoe durability and to protect the feet from abrasion-related blistering EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel Padded sockliner and insole for added comfort and impact protection Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with protruding lugs and rubber waffles for strong grip of the road Vertical scoop below the inner foot to support ergonomic fit Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
